title: Legionellosis in residents of England and Wales: 2024
body: "Legionnaires’ disease is a severe but uncommon form of pneumonia associated with exposure to water systems (natural or man-made) colonised by legionella bacteria.  This report presents the epidemiological data on cases of Legionnaires’ disease reported in residents of England and Wales in 2024.  Previous annual reports from 2017 to 2023 are available.  View the report’s pre-release access list. "
